name: Bay Door
description: A wide sliding door leading out to the corridor. It stands open, its mechanism apparently triggered when your pod activated.

name: Bay C-7 Entrance
description: The entrance to Hibernation Bay C-7. Cold vapor drifts out from within.

name: Corridor West
description: The corridor continues west, following the green guide strip toward a wider junction area.

name: Medical Station Door
description: A door marked with a red cross and the words MEDICAL STATION C. It slides open as you approach.

name: Exit to Corridor
description: The door back to Corridor C.

name: Corridor East
description: The corridor stretches east toward the hibernation bays.

name: Hydroponics Entrance
description: An archway threaded with stray vines. Warm, humid air and the smell of growing things wafts through. A sign reads HYDROPONICS GALLERY but someone has painted over it with the word GARDEN in green.

name: Exit to Junction
description: The archway back to Junction C. The air is noticeably cooler and drier beyond it.

name: Engineering Hatch
description: A heavy hatch in the floor with yellow-and-black hazard striping. A keypad glows beside it. The word ENGINEERING is stenciled on the rim.

name: Commons Passage
description: A wide passage leading toward the bow. The guide strips here split into multiple colors. A sign reads THE COMMONS but the lights beyond are dark.

name: Overgrown Path
description: The vegetation thickens to the north, where the grow-troughs have been completely overtaken. A narrow path winds between the trunks of plants that have no business being this large.

name: Sternward Corridor
description: The corridor continues toward the stern, dimmer with distance.

name: Corridor C
description: Back toward the lit stretch of corridor.

name: Bay C-8
description: A sealed bay door, identical to the others, ajar.

name: The Dark Stretch
description: The corridor runs on past the last working light.

exit.destinationIntent: More hibernation bays in identical rows, fading into darkness — the institutional vastness of C-Deck

name: Corridor
description: Back out to the sternward corridor.

name: The Trough Rows
description: Orderly rows where the Quarter is still disciplined.

name: Hydroponics Gallery
description: Back into the overgrowth.

name: Hydroponics Gallery
description: Back toward the lit tangle.

name: Toward the Water
description: The dripping gets louder somewhere past the glow.

exit.destinationIntent: The reservoir at the heart of the Botanical Quarter — open water on a spaceship, and whatever tends it

name: Junction C
description: Back to the lit junction.

name: The Commons Hall
description: The passage opens into a vast dark space.

name: Commons Passage
description: Back up the passage toward the junction.

name: The Arcades
description: Shuttered booths along the hall's flank.

name: The Warm Light
description: A steady warm light in the far corner.

name: The Reliquary Walk
description: A corridor visibly full past its doorframe.

name: The Amphitheater Doors
description: Double doors with a booking form still pinned beside them.

exit.destinationIntent: The Commons amphitheater — tiered, dark, and grand; the stage is set for a performance that never happened

name: The Commons Hall
description: Back into the great hall.

name: The Commons Hall
description: Back into the dark of the hall.

name: The Commons Hall
description: Back out to where the architecture wins.

name: The Heart
description: Deeper, where the shelves get older.

name: The Reliquary Walk
description: Back along the single-file history.

name: Junction C
description: Back up through the heavy door.

name: The Pump Gallery
description: Stairs descending toward rhythmic machinery.

name: Engineering Access
description: The stairs back up to the landing.

name: The Deep Works
description: A catwalk continues over larger machines.

exit.destinationIntent: The mechanical decks proper — air recyclers, the great engines, and the systems that maintain the systems
